question:
177.) You have a distributed application that periodically processes large volumes of data across multiple Amazon EC2 Instances. The application is designed to recovery gracefully from Amazon EC2 instance failures. You are required to accomplish this task in the most cost-effective way. Which of the following will meet your requirements?

A. Spot Instances
B. Reserved Instances
C. Dedicated Instances
D. On-Demand Instances
